title: Japanese Negative Film Bus Window Portrait
sourceTitle: Japanese Negative Film Bus Window Portrait

imagePrompts.prompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, bus window seat, soft daylight streaming in, slight overexposure highlights on face and window edges, low contrast, muted faded colors, subtle grain  subject leaning lightly against window, head tilted

prompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, bus window seat, soft daylight streaming in, slight overexposure highlights on face and window edges, low contrast, muted faded colors, subtle grain  subject leaning lightly against window, head tilted
originalPrompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, bus window seat, soft daylight streaming in, slight overexposure highlights on face and window edges, low contrast, muted faded colors, subtle grain  subject leaning lightly against window, head tilted

promptTranslations.zh: 日本负片美学，巴士靠窗座位，柔和的日光流入，脸部和窗户边缘轻微过度曝光高光，低对比度，柔和褪色，微妙的颗粒主体轻轻靠在窗户上，头部倾斜
promptTranslations.fr: Esthétique du film négatif japonais, siège de la fenêtre du bus, lumière douce du jour entrant, légers reflets de surexposition sur la face et les bords des fenêtres, faible contraste, couleurs atténuées et atténuées, sujet au grain subtil légèrement appuyé contre la fenêtre, tête inclinée
promptTranslations.ru: Эстетика японской негативной пленки, сиденье у окна автобуса, струящийся мягкий дневной свет, легкие переэкспонированные блики на лице и по краям окна, низкий контраст, приглушенные блеклые цвета, объект с тонкой зернистостью, слегка прислоненный к окну, наклоненная голова
promptTranslations.pt: Estética de filme negativo japonês, assento na janela do ônibus, entrada suave de luz do dia, leves destaques de superexposição no rosto e nas bordas da janela, baixo contraste, cores suaves e desbotadas, objeto granulado sutil levemente inclinado contra a janela, cabeça inclinada
promptTranslations.ja: 日本のネガフィルムの美学、バスの窓際の座席、差し込む柔らかな日の光、顔と窓の端のわずかな露出オーバーのハイライト、低コントラスト、落ち着いた色あせた色、窓に軽く寄りかかった微妙な粒子の被写体、頭を傾けた
promptTranslations.ko: 일본 네거티브 필름 미학, 버스 창가 좌석, 부드러운 일광 유입, 얼굴과 창 가장자리의 약간 과다 노출 하이라이트, 낮은 대비, 희미한 희미한 색상, 창에 살짝 기대어 있는 미묘한 결 피사체, 기울어진 머리
